description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed within a walled property, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade includes two garage doors, large windows, and a landscaped garden with palm trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and additional greenery. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some gray and natural stone accents, and the windows are arranged in vertical strips. The property includes paved driveways, walkways, and multiple entry points, with the main entrance set back behind a landscaped area. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a clean, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, all enclosed within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two garage doors, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Opposite facade with more windows, a secondary entrance, and a view of the pool and garden.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the driveway, parked cars, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, no porch, flanked by large windows and landscaped with shrubs and trees.
